message:
🐛 Fix demo cards showing blank body during lazy chunk loading (#783)

Cards in DEMO_DATA_CARDS had their CardWrapper skeleton blanket-suppressed
via `!(effectiveIsDemoData || isDemoMode)`. During React.lazy() chunk loading,
CardSuspenseFallback reports hasData: false but the skeleton was suppressed,
leaving the card body completely blank.

Fix: Only suppress skeleton for demo cards when child has actually reported
having data (effectiveHasData). During chunk loading, skeleton shows normally.

Affects all DEMO_DATA_CARDS: kagenti, kubecost, opencost, gateway, argocd,
service exports/imports, kustomization, overlay comparison, etc.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
